batch_metadata.note: CP2 CALIBRATION BATCH. RF-09 Gaslighting pass initialized. unflagged_notable.message_text: ROW-50: 'You want to tell her about being respectful at church but you text me while church is going on and sit and draw' / ROW-58: 'I've sat next to you. You bring a notebook. I've seen you' / ROW-61: 'Check your own etiquette'
unflagged_notable.assessment: DARVO pivot following Eli's legitimate co-parenting concern about church behavior — flagged as RF-04 primary (B-001-001). RF-09 peripheral: the DARVO mechanism involves implicit reality-reframing ('Eli has no standing to raise this concern because he does the same thing'). However, no specific reality claim with a documentable contradiction is present. No RF-09 primary flag. CP2 question: was there a verbal conversation surrounding this incident that Melissa later denied or characterized differently?

arc_state_snapshot.note: RF-09 arc state initialized at zero. B-001 is the lowest-conflict period (Jan-Oct 2022, 355/365 messages produce no flags in RF-04). No RF-09 primary signals detected. Triage Phase A concentration (24 of 37 keyword hits) is expected — gaslighting often concentrates in early conflict as the manipulative party establishes narrative control. However, the calibration batch itself is pre-escalation. Expected arc activation: around B-017-B-019 (Aug-Oct 2024 mega-cluster period, when DARVO mechanisms became documented in RF-04).

items: CP2-RF09: 6 calibration questions generated — see cp2-RF-09-review.json

batch_observations.tone_assessment: Lowest-conflict period in dataset. Jan-Oct 2022. Pre-escalation baseline. RF-04 documented 3 flags (DARVO sequence, contempt attack, child-mediated guilt delivery) but all are pattern-framing attacks rather than reality-denial claims. No RF-09 primary signals in the calibration batch is the correct result.
batch_observations.rf09_assessment: Zero primary RF-09 flags. The triage Phase A concentration likely reflects: (1) 'you're remembering wrong' type language in mid-2023 onward escalation batches; (2) Eli's Sent-direction corrections ('that's not what you said') which generate keyword hits without constituting RF-09 signals against Eli; (3) early DARVO-adjacent sequences that tip into denial patterns. B-001 confirms the cooperative-baseline period does not contain documentable reality claims. CP2 calibration is critical before proceeding — the cross-reference methodology requires knowing which denials are most significant.
batch_observations.cross_rf_context: RF-04 B-001 DARVO pivot (ROW-50-61) is the most relevant adjacent signal. RF-05 S-020 (Jul 2025) 'DARVO-denial mechanism' is the strongest anticipated RF-09 compound anchor in Phase B. RF-04 COMP-RF04-029 (Feb 2026 admitted-incident amplification: raised voice → verbal abuse → traumatized → drinking problem) is a strong Level C-D distortion candidate. ROW-6819 coaching admission (B-018) is a forward-looking RF-09 anchor: any subsequent denial of coaching is Level A gaslighting.
